index.description: Turn an idea or assumption into evidence. Output is a written go/no-go decision backed by data. Customer interviews, problem validation, MVP tests, demand probes, kill criteria, willingness-to-pay tests.

playbook.summary: Designer comes out of N user interviews with raw audio/transcripts; ends with a tagged insight bank + a prioritized list of design problems queued for the next sprint.
A 30-minute demo for 3-10 design partners runs cleanly; structured feedback is captured against 3 hypotheses; follow-ups are filed within 48 hours.
30-90 min with one design partner → N failure modes captured, turned into eval rows + roadmap items before session ends.
"30-min prospect call: walk in with a hypothesis, walk out with enough signal to draft a proposal OR a clean disqualify. Done = call notes saved, fit score recorded, next-step email sent within 24h."
Owned audience → next product chosen by audience signal plus paid pre-orders before code.
Pick the next product by mining an audience you already own (or are growing), not by guessing market need.
"Time-boxed experiment: try a new embedding or reranker model on a frozen eval set, score, decide go/no-go without touching production."
Exploratory testing session on new feature. Time-boxed charter-driven session against a feature; surface defects scripted tests would miss without writing automation up front.

Pre-sales discovery on a fixed-price proposal → discovery report, sized three-point estimate with risk reserves, defensible margin, and a bid/no-bid recommendation the delivery team will not regret...
"One screen scored against Nielsen's 10 heuristics plus a11y rules; severity-rated issue list ready for engineering and design follow-up."
"v1 is not working: retention flat, growth stalled, founder energy bleeding."
Live MVP stuck under ~$1K MRR → documented PMF signal OR triggered pivot.

BA leads a structured discovery before contract signature so the SoW reflects real complexity rather than wishful pitch numbers. End state — agency / outsource shop submits a bid backed by traced a...
Working MVP → public-ready v1 with testimonials and waitlist after a closed beta.
Run a controlled pricing or packaging test from hypothesis through experiment design, segment selection, rollout, measurement, and a packaging decision the business can act on.
MVP is live but stuck under ~$1K MRR.
Raw idea in a notebook → paid landing page + working MVP with first 5 paying users.
One 45-60 min interview with a single stakeholder ends with a typed transcript, validated decisions, an open-questions list, and follow-up actions assigned. Repeatable per stakeholder.
Plan, run, and harvest a structured series of 4–6 workshops that converges contradictory stakeholders on a shared mental model, decisions log, and committed scope. End state — sponsor has a single...
"Single round of moderated + unmoderated usability testing on a defined feature -> severity-ranked findings + design fixes scoped + follow-up validation plan."
"One moderated session on a prototype: task success/failure per task, behavioral observations, critical issues flagged same-day for fix triage."
One interview executed with a structured guide, recording and transcript stored, 5-10 atomic insights tagged into a JTBD or opportunity tree within 24 hours.
"One participant interview end-to-end: pre-flight checks, on-time run, notes captured, raw artifacts filed, follow-up scheduled."
"Closed-loop 4-week discovery cycle for one product area: signed plan, fieldwork, synthesis, prioritized opportunity tree."
"Bridge the canyon between 'leadership wants AI' and 'team commits roadmap slot'."
